stages.title: Site Analysis
stages.narration: Stage 1. Site analysis. Light gauge steel structures require accurate layout because structural members are prefabricated.
stages.explanation: Light gauge steel structures require accurate layout because structural members are prefabricated.

stages.title: Setting Out
stages.narration: Stage 2. Setting out. Building lines and anchor bolt locations are marked on the foundation grid.
stages.explanation: Setting out establishes exact member locations and alignment.

stages.title: Excavation
stages.narration: Stage 3. Foundation trenches are excavated to competent bearing strata.
stages.explanation: Foundations transfer building loads safely into the ground.

stages.title: PCC and Footings
stages.narration: Stage 4. Plain cement concrete and reinforced concrete footings are placed to support the steel frame.
stages.explanation: Footings distribute loads and support the lightweight steel frame.

stages.title: Anchor Bolt Installation
stages.narration: Stage 5. Anchor bolts are installed and aligned to transfer frame loads into the foundation.
stages.explanation: Anchor bolts transfer loads from the steel frame into the foundation.

stages.title: Steel Floor Tracks
stages.narration: Stage 6. Galvanized base tracks are fixed to anchor bolts to establish the structural footprint.
stages.explanation: Base tracks establish the structural footprint and support wall framing.

stages.title: Steel Wall Studs
stages.narration: Stage 7. Cold-formed steel studs rise vertically and connect to base and top tracks.
stages.explanation: Steel studs act as the primary vertical structural members.

stages.title: Steel Beams
stages.narration: Stage 8. Steel beams connect wall frames and transfer roof loads to supporting walls.
stages.explanation: Steel beams transfer roof loads into supporting wall systems.

stages.title: Steel Bracing System
stages.narration: Stage 9. Steel bracing members are now installed. These elements resist horizontal earthquake and wind forces and significantly improve structural stability.
stages.explanation: Bracing resists lateral earthquake and wind forces.

stages.title: Roof Truss Assembly
stages.narration: Stage 10. Triangulated roof trusses are assembled and connected to the wall frames.
stages.explanation: Triangulated roof trusses efficiently distribute loads.

stages.title: Roof Installation
stages.narration: Stage 11. Purlins and lightweight roof sheets are installed with self-drilling fasteners.
stages.explanation: Lightweight roofing reduces earthquake forces acting on the structure.

stages.title: Exterior Sheathing
stages.narration: Stage 12. Exterior sheathing panels are fixed to the frame to develop diaphragm stiffness.
stages.explanation: Sheathing improves stiffness and load distribution.

stages.title: Insulation System
stages.narration: Stage 13. Insulation fills wall cavities to improve thermal comfort and energy efficiency.
stages.explanation: Insulation improves thermal comfort and energy efficiency.

stages.title: Interior Finishes
stages.narration: Stage 14. Interior boards, doors, and windows complete the habitable enclosure.
stages.explanation: Interior systems improve usability and durability.

stages.title: Completed Structure
stages.narration: Construction complete. Light gauge steel structures perform well because they are lightweight, ductile and capable of dissipating seismic energy.
stages.explanation: Cold-formed steel house with braced frame and sheathed diaphragm.

anchor_bolt.title: Anchor Bolt
anchor_bolt.loadTransfer: Transfers uplift and shear from track to footing.
anchor_bolt.upliftResistance: Designed for tension from wind and seismic overturning.

steel_stud.title: Steel Wall Stud
steel_stud.bucklingResistance: Braced against lateral buckling by sheathing and tracks.

steel_beam.title: Steel Beam
steel_beam.bendingBehavior: Flexural member spanning between wall lines.
steel_beam.loadTransfer: Transfers roof and floor loads to studs and columns.

steel_bracing.title: Steel Bracing
steel_bracing.earthquakeResistance: Provides lateral stiffness and energy dissipation path.
steel_bracing.windResistance: Resists wind suction and pressure on envelope.

roof_truss.title: Roof Truss
roof_truss.forceDistribution: Triangulation distributes gravity and lateral loads.
roof_truss.triangulation: Tension chords and compression struts work together.

sheathing_panel.title: Sheathing Panel
sheathing_panel.stiffnessContribution: Develops in-plane diaphragm action with frame.
sheathing_panel.compositeAction: Composite wall resists racking and drift.
